item.title: Topolski's Chronicle, V.2 Index, List of Drawings, 1954
item.creator: Topolski, Feliks, 1907-1989
item.description: Topolski's Chronicle is a series of broadsheets created by Feliks Topolski and distributed bimonthly to subscribers from 1953 through 1982. Topolski was a superlative draughtsman and covered current events with an artistic, unique style.

pages.page_summary: This page serves as a detailed index for Topolski's Chronicle, 1954 Volume II, listing hundreds of individual sketches and their associated topics, people, and locations, along with errata and general editorial organization. It documents an extensive journey through global political, cultural, and social scenes of the mid-20th century.

pages.typeset_text: TOPOLSKI’S CHRONICLE 1954 VOLUME II INDEX Abed, Pierre 369 Aeroplanes 207, 211, 235, 284, 346, 349… [continues with an extensive alphabetical index covering names, topics, places, and events per page and a publication header at the top]
pages.page_summary: This page presents the index for Volume II of Topolski’s Chronicle, 1954, providing an alphabetical guide to the people, places, and significant events depicted or discussed in the publication. It contains no imagery but acts as a key navigational aid to the Chronicle’s illustrated and editorial content.

(Johore Estate Council) 135, 287, 288, 290-292 Worth, Irene 196 Xenophobia and the Combat of 100, 119, 120, 154, 157, 160, 165, 171, 179, 296, 297 Y Yang 158 Yunnan, China 244 Zealots 97, 119, 129, 136-148, 157, 161-166, 177, 185, 218-233, 289, 293-295, 304, 305, 308, 311 Zeitgeist 97, 101, 105, 110, 117, 124, 127, 128, 134, 136, 156-166, 206, 217, 224-226, 234, 236, 241-243, 247-250, 284, 304, 305, 308, 312, 332, 340, 346, 351, 371 NUMBERS REFER TO DRAWINGS ONLY, NOT TO ISSUES LIST OF DRAWINGS THE DRAWINGS IN "TOPOLSKI'S CHRONICLE" ARE DELIBERATELY SELECTED ONLY FROM THOSE WHICH WERE PUT ON PAPER "FROM LIFE" AND "IN ACTION". THEY ARE NEVER LATER RETOUCHED OR REDRAWN; THUS THE AUTHENTICITY OF DOCUMENTATION IS MAINTAINED. IN THE FEW CASES WHEN PAINTINGS OR COMPOSED DRAWINGS ARE INCLUDED, THEIR DIFFERENT NATURE IS STATED SOME ORIGINAL DRAWINGS REPRODUCED IN THE "CHRONICLE" ARE FOR SALE
pages.handwritten_text: John jeep charging recognizable system when reporting while figures are around, which makes the record straight, deliberating for... (rest is illegible or too ambiguous to transcribe accurately)
sketch_descriptions: A loosely-drawn crowd of figures, including a person in a military-style cap, others standing or sitting, one in a possible wheelchair, and another in a wide Asian conical hat, suggesting a lively outdoor scene involving both movement and observation.
pages.page_summary: This page contains an index of subjects and drawing numbers from Topolski's Chronicle, alongside an expressive sketch depicting a diverse group of figures in an active outdoor scene with accompanying handwritten notes.
